title: Restocking
quickAnswer: Villagers can restock up to twice per day if they can reach and work at their linked workstation during the work part of the day.
keyFacts: A villager needs a valid profession and matching workstation.
Trading with a villager does not prevent later restocks.
Pathing and workstation access matter more than the exact room layout.
commonMistakes: Blocking the villager from reaching its workstation.
Expecting a nitwit or unemployed villager to restock trades.
